alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation covers general labelling requirements for pre-packaged foodstuffs, which typically include ingredient lists, allergen declarations, nutritional information, and warnings. Specific details must be verified in the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation outlines the general requirements for food products to be considered Halal, impacting ingredients, processing, and labelling for Halal claims. Compliance is mandatory for products marketed as Halal.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - General requirements for unprocessed genetically modified agricultural products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation sets general requirements for unprocessed genetically modified agricultural products, which would likely include specific labelling requirements and potentially approval processes if used as ingredients in food products.

alerts.title: Added: GCC/GSO Labelling Requirement - Mandatory shelf life periods for food products
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This regulation specifies mandatory shelf life periods for certain food products. Compliance with these periods is critical for food safety and must be verified in the full standard.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - General requirements for Halal food
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies general requirements for Halal food, which may include rules for ingredients, additives, and labelling. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full document.

alerts.title: Added: GCC Labelling Requirement - Mandatory expiration dates
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Verification required. This technical regulation specifies mandatory expiration dates for food products. Specific details must be verified by consulting the full document.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - General Food Safety and Sanitation
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Compliance required. The Food Sanitation Law is a fundamental legal framework for food safety in Japan, covering various aspects including contaminants, additives, and labelling.

alerts.title: Added: Japan Contaminant Limits - General Food Safety Principles
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Compliance required. The Food Safety Basic Law establishes the fundamental principles for ensuring food safety in Japan.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Additive Limits - Non-permitted food additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not allowed for import or sale.. An application can be submitted to SFA to evaluate the use of a non-permitted additive.

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Contaminant Limits - Contaminants exceeding regulatory limits
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Not allowed for import or sale..

alerts.title: Added: Singapore Labelling Requirement - Declaration of ingredients and additives
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: All ingredients and additives used in food products must be declared in list of ingredients on food labels.. Applies to prepacked foods for sale in Singapore.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Crustacean shellfish, mango, peanuts, sesame seeds, milk and goat milk, eggs, tree nuts, gluten-containing cereals, soybeans, fish
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory declaration if present as ingredient or food additive. These 10 allergens require mandatory labeling for prepackaged foods.

alerts.title: Added: Taiwan Allergen List - Sulphite as residue sulphur dioxide
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: 10 or more milligrams per kilogram of food. Sulphite requires mandatory labeling if its residue sulphur dioxide concentration meets or exceeds the specified limit.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Compliance with new regulations for food in hermetically sealed containers
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory. Businesses should prepare for the enforcement of Notification of the Ministry of Public Health (No. 469) B.E. 2569 (2026 A.D.) regarding Food in Hermetically Sealed Containers.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Food labeling and nutrition labeling
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Mandatory. All food products must comply with general food labeling and nutrition labeling requirements.

alerts.title: Added: Thailand Labelling Requirement - Prohibited foods
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Prohibited from production, import, or sale. A list of foods prohibited from production, import, or sale must be consulted.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Additive Limits - Prohibited substances
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Prohibited from use in food. New: Prohibited from use. Prohibited substances are listed in FDA regulations (21 CFR Part 189).

alerts.title: Added: United States Allergen List - Major Food Allergens
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must be declared. The nine major food allergens are milk, eggs, fish, Crustacean shellfish, tree nuts, peanuts, wheat, soybeans, and sesame. FALCPA requires specific labeling.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - 'Gluten-free' claim
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Defined by FDA rule. New: Must meet defined standard for gluten content.. Specific compliance requirements exist for fermented and hydrolyzed foods bearing the 'gluten-free' claim, effective August 12, 2020.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - Allergen preventive controls
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: N/A. New: Facilities must put written procedures in place to control allergen cross-contact and ensure accurate labeling.. Part of the FDA’s “Current Good Manufacturing Practice, Hazard Analysis, and Risk-Based Preventive Controls for Human Food” rule (CGMP & PC rule, 21 CFR part 117).

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - Cochineal extract and carmine
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. New: Must be declared on the label.. Identified as allergenic substances derived from insects.

alerts.title: Modified: United States Labelling Requirement - FD&C Yellow No. 5
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: Old: Check official source. New: Must be identified on labels.. Required due to potential hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Major Food Allergens Declaration Format
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: Must appear in parentheses after ingredient name OR in a 'contains' statement immediately after/next to the ingredient list.. The type of tree nut, species of fish, and Crustacean shellfish must also be declared.

alerts.title: Added: United States Labelling Requirement - Sulfiting agents (e.g., sodium bisulfite)
alerts.actionRequired: Review impacted seasoning/snack formulations, labels, COAs and export approvals.
alerts.details: New: ≥10. Must be declared on food labels when present in food at or above the specified concentration due to potential adverse reactions.

alerts.title: Removed: China Additive Limits - Food Additive Use
alerts.details: Old: Must comply with GB 2760-2015. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Removed: China Labelling Requirement - Compliance with GB Food Safety Standards

alerts.details: Old: Follow Code of Practice for Prevention and Reduction. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Additive Limits - Food Additives
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Verification of approved additives and their conditions of use is required via the Additives Database, which is based on Annex II of Regulation (EC) No 1333/2008.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Additive Limits - Food additives
alerts.details: Old: Verification required. Rule no longer appeared in the latest extraction. Verify whether source changed or extraction missed it.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Food safety criteria for bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Compliance with food safety criteria for relevant foodborne bacteria, their toxins, and metabolites in specific foods is required as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes sampling in processing areas and equipment
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Food business operators manufacturing RTE food with a potential L. monocytogenes risk must perform sampling procedures on food processing areas and equipment surfaces according to guidelines.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Listeria monocytogenes shelf-life studies
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Shelf-life studies (durability studies and challenge tests) for Listeria monocytogenes in RTE foods must be conducted according to technical guidance and comply with food safety criteria in Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Process hygiene criteria
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Compliance with process hygiene criteria is required to indicate the correct functioning of the production process, as laid down in Commission Regulation (EC) No 2073/2005.

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella control programmes (equivalence recognition)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Other EU countries or regions can obtain special Salmonella guarantees if their control programme is recognized as equivalent to those approved for Sweden and Finland, in accordance with Regulations (EC) No 853/2004 (foodstuffs) and 2160/2003 (animals).

alerts.title: Added: European Union Microbiology Limits - Salmonella prevalence (special guarantees for Sweden, Finland, Norway)
alerts.details: New: Check official source. Special guarantees regarding Salmonella prevalence apply to trade of certain live animals and products from other countries to Sweden, Finland, and Norway, as laid down in specific Council Decisions and Regulations.

alerts.title: Removed: European Union Microbiology Limits - Foodborne bacteria, toxins, and metabolites (e.g., Salmonella, Listeria monocytogenes, Enterobacter sakazakii, staphylococcal enterotoxins, histamine)
